subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Husayn! Thy brother hath made mention of thee, wherefore have We remembered thee with verses that are the cause of vision's dawning in the eyes of humankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد حسین قد ذکرک اخوک ذکرناک بایات کانت عله ظهور البصر فی البشر و السبب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
